ephemeralOption: Set to "True" to show the response only to you
otherSystemsDesc: Various systems you can set up
funDesc: Commands for fun and general use.
tripsitOnlyDesc: Commands only available in TripSit's Discord server.
creditsDesc: People and projects who have contributed to TripBot.
feedbackDesc: Provide feedback or get involved in development.
harmReductionIntro:
These commands are for harm reduction purposes, and are not intended to replace the advice of a medical professional.

Harm reduction is a set of practical strategies and ideas aimed at reducing negative consequences associated with drug use. Harm Reduction is also a movement for social justice built on a belief in, and respect for, the rights of people who use drugs.
drugDesc:
Display drug information sourced from both TripSit and Psychonaut Wiki. 
Accepts alias and common names for substances.
comboDesc: Display drug combination information sourced from both TripSit and Psychonaut Wiki.
warmlineDesc: Display information on various warmlines people can call.
guidesDesc: Display a list of guides from the TripSit Wiki.
drugCheckingDesc: Display information about drug checking services.
testKitsDesc: Display information on how to get drug testing kits, including coupon codes
comboChartDesc: Display a chart of drug combinations and their safety ratings.
groundingDesc: Steps to help the user ground themselves.
reagentsDesc: Display information about common substances and their reagent reactions.
mushroomInfoDesc: Display dosage information about common mushrooms.
calcDxmDesc: Calculate a safe dosage of DXM based on weight and product.
calcBenzoDesc: Convert one benzodiazepine to another, very roughly.
calcKetamineDesc: Calculate a safe dosage of Ketamine based on weight.
calcPsychDesc: Calculate dosage of tryptamines (LSD/Mushrooms) based on last dosage.
iDoseDesc: Record your dosages and recall them at a later time.
remindMeDesc: Set a reminder for a specific time.
funIntro: These commands are for fun and general use.
imageDesc: Generate an image using DALL-E. Only available to active subscribers!
tripToysDesc: Display a list of trip toys.
kippDesc: Remind people to Keep It Positive Please.
magick8Desc: Ask the magic 8 ball a question.
urbanDefineDesc: Define a word using Urban Dictionary.
topicDesc: Get a random topic to discuss.
systemsIntro: TripBot has a few systems you can set up to help manage your server.
applicationsDesc:
This allows you to setup a system for users to apply for roles.
It allows people to submit an application, and then the staff can review and approve or deny the application.
It is not used on TripSit anymore but is available for use in other servers.
techHelpDesc:
This creates a "talk to moderators" message where people can fill in a form to get help with issues
It doesn't need to be technical issues, it can be moderation or whatever.
rulesDesc: This creates a series of messages in the channel to display your rules. It comes with some default rules that TripSit uses.
tripsitSpecificIntro: These commands are only available in TripSit's Discord server.
profileSystemDesc:
This will display your profile card for all to see!
Your profile card includes information such as:
- Your birthday, set with `/birthday`.
- Your timezone, set with `/timezone`.
- A rough calculations on how many messages you've sent.
- A rough calculation on how much time you've spent in voice chat.
- How much karma you have, which is given to you when people react to your posts with {{emojiVoteUp}}.
- How many tokens you have, which are gained via the `/rpg` system.
- Your current level and progress to next level.
rpgDesc:
TripBot has its own RPG game system where you can generate tokens and buy flavor stuff for your profile.
You can do tasks to gain tokens, and then spend them on things like:
- Backgrounds for your profile card.
- Titles for your profile card.
... More to come!
quotesDesc:
Right click on a message and click 'add quote' to add a quote to the quote database.
Anyone can add a quote, you can always delete your own quotes if you want.
h2flowDesc:
Every so often TripBot will prompt the chat to either: hydrate, move around, send appreciation to someone.
React to these messages to gain points, that's all. It's just a fun little thing to keep people engaged and active.
reminderDesc: Sends various reminders into chat, to remind people to keep things on topic.
countingDesc: Counting channels, exactly what it sounds like. You count up from 1, and if you mess up, you start over.
lastDesc: See the last message someone sent in chat.
